embeds.title: Co-Founder
embeds.description: As a Co-Founder, you helped build The SnowHaven Empire from the ground up. You hold **permanent senior authority** — a step above the Owner in matters of vision, culture, and structural decisions.

fields.name: 📋 Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
• Supporting the Foundership Team and Owner in major decisions
• Acting as senior advisor on policy and community direction
• Overseeing high-level operations when the Owner is unavailable
• Reviewing and approving significant structural changes
• Serving as arbitrators when Owner and Co-Owner disagree
• Maintaining the founding vision and culture of the server

fields.name: 🔑 Admin Panel Access
fields.value:
Co-Founders have **full access** to the TSHE website admin panel to manage all site content, toggle maintenance mode, update rules, guides, and all public-facing information.

**URL:** https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin
**Credentials:** Provided by the Foundership Team — never share or write in Discord.

fields.name: ⚡ Authority Overview
fields.value:
• Near-unrestricted server permissions, second only to Foundership Team
• Can override Owner decisions in exceptional circumstances
• Full access to all staff channels, logs, and server settings
• Can approve or veto Co-Owner and Executive appointments
• Can issue any punishment type without restriction

fields.name: 🚨 When to Act Directly
fields.value:
• When the Owner and Co-Owner are in dispute
• Cases that have been escalated past the Owner level
• Misconduct by Owner or Co-Owner
• Decisions that set long-term precedent for the server

For day-to-day moderation: let the chain handle it.

fields.name: 📞 Escalation Chain
fields.value:
**Receives escalations from:** Owner, Co-Owner
**Escalates to:** Foundership Team (exceptional cases only)

fields.name: 🌐 Key Links
fields.value:
🔗 [Admin Panel](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin) — Full site control
📜 [Rules Page](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/rules) — Community rules
🛡️ [Staff Guide](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/staff) — Public role guide
⚖️ [Appeal System](https://appeal.gg/s/1466990155020898413) — Ban appeals
